mapper.insert:
insert into config_value(option_id, name, spread) VALUES
(#{item.optionId}, #{item.name}, COALESCE(#{item.spread}, 0))

insert into goods_class( goods_type,
dish_id,
combo_id,
menu_class_id ) values
( #{item.goodsType},
#{item.dishId},
#{item.comboId},
#{item.menuClassId} )

insert into group_detail(group_id, dish_id, num, required) values
(#{item.groupId},#{item.dishId},#{item.num},#{item.required})
mapper.update:
update menu_class
name = #{name},
sort = #{sort},
state = #{state},
where id = #{id}

update config_option
name = #{name},
sort = #{sort},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from dish
where name like concat('%', #{dishName}, '%')
and state = #{state}
and id in (select dish_id from goods_class where menu_class_id in (select id from menu_class where name like concat('%', #{className},'%')))

select count(*) from combo
where name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')

select dc.dish_id, dc.option_id,co.name from dish_config dc join config_option co on dc.option_id = co.id where dc.dish_id in
#{dishId}

select cv.id,cv.spread,cv.name from config_value cv where cv.id in
#{valueId}

select d.id,d.cover,d.price,d.name from dish d where d.id in
#{dishId}

select c.id,c.reduce_price,c.name,c.cover from combo c where c.id in
#{comboId}

select f.dish_id,f.material_id,f.num from formula f where f.dish_id in
#{dishId}

select cm.dish_id,cm.value_id,cm.material_id,cm.spread from config_material cm where (cm.dish_id,cm.value_id) in
(#{configMaterial.dishId},#{configMaterial.valueId})

select cg.combo_id,cg.group_id from combo_group cg where cg.group_id in
#{groupId}

select gd.group_id,gd.dish_id from group_detail gd where gd.group_id in
#{groupId}
